commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=37b3934272d466556685f447fbcf4b6a29eac58d)
commands.review_summary:
This PR passes the run trigger into before-tool-call loop detection and logs three cron-triggered loop-warning detector messages at info instead of warn.

PR surface: Source +19. Total +19 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: warning-level loop results still flow through runBeforeToolCallHook's log.warn path, and cron runtime has non-isolated session targets. I did not run a live cron job in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer follow-up is needed to address the review findings and add real behavior proof; automation should not take over while the external PR proof gate is unmet and a competing open PR is also unresolved.

target.title: fix(agents): downgrade loop warnings to info for cron-isolated sessions
target.body:
Isolated cron sessions are ephemeral by design; each run is a fresh ephemeral session. Repeated exec calls within a single run are expected retry behavior (retry-on-fail, exhaust-before-fallback), not a runaway loop.

The loop detector flags repeated exec calls as potential runaway, but for isolated sessions with lifetime shorter than the cron interval, re-tries within the same run are the intended behavior.

Downgrade the three loop-detection warning logs from `warn` to `info` when `trigger==='cron'` so they no longer flood `gateway.err.log` with ~50 warnings per 48h (roughly 4 per 15min cron tick).

### Changes
- `HookContext`: add `trigger` field
- `agent-tools.ts`: pass `trigger` into `HookContext`
- `agent-tools.before-tool-call.ts`: forward `trigger` to `detectToolCallLoop`
- `tool-loop-detection.ts`: use `info` level for cron-triggered warnings (3 locations)

### Affected logs
- `Polling loop warning: ...`
- `Ping-pong loop warning: ...`
- `Loop warning: ... called N times with identical arguments`

### Testing
- TypeScript compilation passes (`tsc --noEmit`)
- Vitest runs were killed by OOM in this environment; the change is purely log-level branching and does not alter loop-detection logic or thresholds

Fixes #69408
target.author: xuzehan-icenter
